falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and indicate a clear trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The RSI (14-period) crosses above 70 and remains above for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained overbought conditions would suggest a potential reversal not aligned with the current HOLD, disproving the UNKNOWN phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds twice the 30-day average volume without a corresponding price movement of more than 3%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Abnormal volatility without directional price movement would indicate a breakdown in the HOLD signal, falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
